title: RE:XP
description: Better looking, better QOL and optimized!, Re-Experience aims to make your Minecraft look so much better and more comfortable to play whilst keeping the game up to utmost optimization with no unnecessary extra than that! It's also Completely client sided.
body:
### This is your first time experiencing Minecraft, once more.

I initially made this modpack for myself to play the base game better but now it's open for everyone to benefit!

# **What's Different ?**
- This pack includes the best optimization mods with no extra or other mods that does the same thing but a little different, basically nearly min-maxxed!
- Many QOL features such as: Auto-Sorting, Auto tool swapping and searchbars in chests etc. Which saves so much unnecessary time spent on mundane tasks so you can focus on your creations more!
- Looks Beautiful! Hold My Items, Perception, Wakes, Visual Effects+ are all included! And many more resource packs that make the game much better. They are all hand picked to go well along eachother and some notable ones are; Detailed Animations, Simple Grass Flowers, Torches Reimagined, Fresh Animations...
- Completely **Client** sided and nothing extra! Which means you could build on top of the pack however you wish!

## Why should you play REXP
Have you ever wanted to just play vanilla or join some friends but you didn't want to setup everything by hand such as getting shaders, optimization mods and many other little things you want to have? Now you don't have to worry about  it, just install REXP and press play!

And if you don't know much about it, why don't you try and take a look yourself? I bet you'll love it!

Lastly, I sincerely thank all the mod creators for their efforts.
